content.problemStatement:
Given a 2D integer array named triangle with n rows. Its first row has 1 element and each succeeding row has one more element in it than the row above it. Return the minimum falling path sum from the first row to the last. 
Movement is allowed only to the bottom or bottom-right cell from the current cell.
content.inputFormat: A 2D integer array named triangle with n rows.
content.outputFormat: The minimum falling path sum from the first row to the last.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use memoization to store the minimum falling path sum for each cell and compute the minimum sum by considering the downward and diagonal moves.
